prompt: Build a premium crypto website inspired by CryptoShield - Protect Your Digital Assets. Keep the page polished, high-trust, and conversion-ready with responsive sections and clear hierarchy.
layoutNotes: Imported from Website Template Hub as a local source-backed template.
Preview and downloadable code are generated from the original HTML source.
Asset paths are normalized so the template can preview inside Multiverse.
responsiveNotes: Responsive layout comes from the original one-page template source.

files.summary: Main template source file imported from Website Template Hub.
files.content:
CryptoShield
Coverage Claims Pricing FAQ
Coverage Claims Pricing FAQ
Coverage 24/7

Protect Your
Crypto Assets

Comprehensive insurance protection for cryptocurrency wallets, exchanges, and smart contracts. Coverage for theft, hacks, and lost keys up to $10M per policy.

$500M+

Total Protected Assets

12K+

Active Policyholders

Complete Coverage Options

All threats covered with flexible plans

Hot Wallet Protection

Coverage for crypto stored in digital wallets. Protection against unauthorized access, theft, and compromised private keys up to $5M per claim.

All major cryptocurrencies

24-hour claims processing

Multi-sig wallets supported

Exchange Insurance

Coverage for assets held on cryptocurrency exchanges. Protection against exchange hacks, insider theft, and operational failures.

500+ supported exchanges

Real-time monitoring

Quick settlement

Smart Contract Coverage

Protection against smart contract bugs, exploits, and reentrancy attacks. Coverage for DeFi platforms and protocol losses.

Audit-backed verification

DeFi protocol certified

Up to $10M coverage

Key Management Insurance

Coverage for hardware wallet loss, backup failures, and seed phrase compromises. Protection for lost private keys and recovery procedures.

Hardware wallet certified

Recovery kit replacement

Zero deductibles

Exploit Protection

Coverage for zero-day exploits, flash loan attacks, and advanced hacking techniques. Coverage includes loss recovery and investigation.

Forensic investigation

Fast claim resolution

Legal support included

Cyber Liability

Coverage for business interruption, legal liability, and regulatory fines. Protection against data breaches and compliance issues.

Legal representation

Compliance consulting

Crisis management

Simple Claims Process

1

Report Incident

Contact our claims team within 24 hours with incident details

2

Investigation

Our experts investigate and verify the loss claim

3

Approval

Claim reviewed and approved within 5-7 business days

4

Settlement

Funds transferred to your wallet within 48 hours

Transparent Pricing

Affordable protection for all asset sizes

Standard

Up to $100K coverage

$299 /year
  • Hot wallet coverage
  • Exchange protection
  • Email support
MOST POPULAR

Professional

Up to $1M coverage

$999 /year
  • Everything in Standard
  • Smart contract coverage
  • 24/7 phone support

Enterprise

Up to $10M coverage

Custom
  • Everything in Professional
  • Dedicated account manager
  • Custom coverage options

Questions?

We cover Bitcoin, Ethereum, and 500+ major cryptocurrencies. Coverage includes tokens held in wallets, exchanges, and smart contracts.
Initial investigation takes 5-7 business days. Approved claims are settled within 48 hours of approval via cryptocurrency transfer.
We do not cover voluntary transfers to scammers or private investment losses. All covered events are documented blockchain hacks and theft.

Don't Risk Your Assets

Get protected with CryptoShield insurance today

CryptoShield

Crypto insurance provider
